name: Delta Screen & Filtration
message: Delta Screens manufactures a variety of flat screens with exceptional rigidity and flatness ideal for catalyst support applications. Precision welded for maximum strength and longevity, our screens resist buckling and collapse under even the heaviest of loads. Plus, our continuous slot design resists plugging and is easy to maintain. Whatever your application, Delta Screens can manufacture catalyst support screens to your exact specifications, including material, size and shape.
